'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=DQ84p8DNecpOIK0B3_heTBhARWNcq1PQz2oy3HCqOqM-1774484728-1.0.1.1-wy4sL8TZK2Kxfreh4STjLwSXoFYmdRryHgg9nmc6A.4"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
